transcript_facts:
- [Findings] annual exam .
- [Findings] all right , well , let's go ahead and do a quick physical exam .
- [Findings] uh , your heart i hear a three out of six , systolic ejection murmur , uh , that's stable .
- [Findings] uh , your lower extremity strength is good , and there's no edema . hey , dragon , show me the ecg . hey , dragon , show me the lumbar spine x-ray . hey , dragon , show me the back x-ray .
- [Findings] um , and we can always give you some pain medication if you , if you get some pain periodically with activity .
- [Findings] hey , dragon , order an echocardiogram .
- [History of Present Illness] um , i've been struggling with my depression , um , a bit more just because we've been trapped really inside and remotely over the past year , so i've been struggling , um , off and on with that . uh , and from looking at the notes , it looks like we've had you on , uh , prozac 20 milligrams a day .
- [History of Present Illness] do you think that you just need to deal with some stress or you wan na try a , a different , uh , medication or ... i think the , the medication has helped me in the past , and maybe just increasing the dose might help me through this patch .
- [History of Present Illness] i know that you've had this chronic back pain that we've been dealing with .
- [History of Present Illness] okay , and do you get any numbing or tingling down your legs or any pain down leg versus the other ? a little bit of numbing , but nothing tingling or hurting down my legs . okay , and does the , um , do those symptoms improve when you stand up or change position ?
- [History of Present Illness] and any weakness in , in your legs ? no , no weakness , just , just the weird numbing .
- [History of Present Illness] and i know that you've had a coronary artery bypass grafting at the young age of 27 , so how's that going ? yeah , i had con- i had a congenital ... you know , i had a congenital artery when i was a baby , so , um , they had to do a cabg on me , um , fairly young in life , but i've been ... my heart's been doing , doing well , and arteries have been looking good .
- [History of Present Illness] um , so looking at you , you do n't appear in any distress . um , your neck , there's no thyroid enlargement .
- [History of Present Illness] your abdomen is soft , and you do have some pain to palpation of your lumbar spine . uh , and you've had decreased flexion of your back .
- [History of Present Illness] do you need some pain medication ?
- [History of Present Illness] and then in terms of your depression , we talked about increasing your prozac , so we'll increase it from 20 milligrams to 40 milligrams .
- [Plan] so let's go ahead and , you know , my , my plan for you at this time , you know , from a chronic back pain standpoint , if you need , um , you know , some more physical therapy , and i can refer you to physical therapy to help with those symptoms that are kind of lingering .
- [Plan] no , i think physical therapy is the right way to , way to start out on this . hey , dragon , order physical therapy referral .
- [Plan] hey , dragon , order prozac , 40 milligrams , once a day . and then in terms of your ... the heart bypass that you've had ... let's go ahead and just order another echocardiogram for you , and i wan na continue you on the aspirin for now , okay ?
- [Plan] hey , dragon , order aspirin 81 milligrams daily .
